title: The Men a Godly Man Keeps Close
caption:
Who's standing next to you says a lot about where you're headed.

A godly man keeps men who tell him the truth. Not the guys who hype every decision, the one or two who'll say "that's pride talking" and stay in the room after they say it.

He keeps men further down the road than him, so he has someone to actually catch up to. And he keeps men who pray, not just post. Plenty of guys quote a verse in the caption. Fewer will pray for you out loud at 11 PM when it's not for an audience.

"Iron sharpens iron, and one man sharpens another." — Proverbs 27:17

But you can't only look for that friend. Somewhere in the circle, you have to become him too.

Save this and text the man who actually fits the list.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #community #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #scripture #christianity
